name: SCC_CreateServicePaymentSelectionReq_DIN
title: SCC_CreateServicePaymentSelectionReq_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateServicePaymentSelectionReq_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char SelectedPaymentOption[], byte SelectedServiceIDs[], byte SelectedParameterSetIDs[], dword ServiceIDCount )
description: Creates a Service Payment Selection Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: SelectedServiceIDs
parameters.description: IDs of the selected services. Must contain at least one entry.

parameters.name: SelectedParameterSetIDs
parameters.description: Parameter set IDs corresponding to the SelectedServiceIDs. Array must be the same size as SelectedServiceIDs, you can use -1 to omit a parameter set ID.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
